title_ja: 俯瞰・ソファ寝そべり・顔と胴の向きが逆の親密カット
title_en: Top-down POV on sofa, head tipped back, face upside-down vs torso
reference_note: English prompts: prompt_en.md. Riamero: fictional Japanese woman; K-beauty-style makeup wording only as style reference; no moles/freckles.

subject.description: Young woman lying back intimately, captured from top-down; face appears upside-down relative to torso as she tips her head back toward the camera.

eyes.look: Half-closed, looking directly at the lens
eyes.direction: Upward toward the camera above her

face.note_when_no_reference: Soft K-beauty-inspired dewy glass skin, glossy reddish-pink lips, subtle blush, soft eyeliner; clear skin without moles or freckles

hair.effect: Gravity pulls strands naturally across face and eyes; organic imperfections, candid feel

body.chest: Visible upper chest and cleavage in neckline
body.legs: Out of focus or cropped; not the focus

skin.visible_areas: Face, neck, collarbones, shoulders, upper chest
skin.texture: Smooth, delicately dewy, clear without moles or freckles
skin.lighting_effect: Warm directional light: gentle highlights on collarbones and upper chest; a distinct deep shadow band across the neck cast by the chin

pose.position: Lying flat on back on soft cushion, head tipped fully back toward camera; right hand gently touching hair near forehead
pose.overall: Heavy relaxed gravity, asymmetrical natural rest

layered_from_skin_outward: White camisole-style bra top with thin spaghetti straps, deep neckline
Dark charcoal fuzzy knit cardigan slipping off both shoulders, tactile contrast with bare skin

accessories.jewelry: Very delicate thin silver chain necklace with tiny pendant resting at upper chest

photography.camera_style: Smartphone casual intimate snapshot aesthetic, top-down personal POV
photography.angle: Top-down close-up from above the top of her head, slightly canted skew for candid feel
photography.shot_type: Close-up portrait biased to face and upper torso
photography.texture: Soft natural noise, authentic digital photo; sharp focus on eyes and lips
photography.lighting: Warm directional single main source indoors: high contrast between lit face and chest and deeply shadowed neck under chin
photography.depth_of_field: Shallow: face sharp; background torso, cushion, and pants slightly soft

background.setting: Cozy indoor living space, on sofa
elements: Textured light beige or grayish sofa cushion
Glimpse of wooden floor at frame edge

the_vibe.mood: Late-night intimacy or lazy Sunday afternoon
the_vibe.aesthetic: Soft casual chic, candid romantic, unposed
the_vibe.authenticity: Messy hair partly over eyes, asymmetrical rest, clothing shifted by gravity
the_vibe.story: Resting on sofa, head tipped back looking up, fingers in hair

must_keep: Top-down perspective with face upside-down relative to torso
Messy hair strands crossing part of face or eyes
Visible upper chest and cleavage within camisole neckline
Distinct shadow across neck from chin
Dewy glossy lip and glass-skin makeup style
avoid_as_positive_style: Not harsh direct on-camera flash as main look
Not standard upright eye-level headshot framing
